name: CodeScanCloudAnalyze
description: Run scanner and upload the results to the CodeScan Cloud server.
helpMarkDown:
This task is not needed for Maven and Gradle projects since the scanner should be run as part of the build.

[More Information](https://www.code-scan.com/cloud/install-configure-scanner-tfs-ts/)
author: codescansf

inputs.name: jdkversion
inputs.label: JDK version source for analysis
inputs.helpMarkDown:
Select the wanted Java version for the analysis : You can choose with either Self provided JAVA_HOME which will pick up the value of this env variable, or you can choose the built-in JAVA_HOME_XX_X64 value on hosted agent. 
Default value is JAVA_HOME_21_X64, however if you choose either of the proposed value and they are not available, JAVA_HOME value will be picked up instead.
